title: Rock lizard
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|Rock}}
'''Rock lizards''' were lizards native to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]. They preferred to live in or around rivers and streams throughout the planet. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] once kept [[Jacen Solo's rock lizard|one]] as a pet. They were small compared to [[Dewback/Legends|dewbacks]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-04-03 -->[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']]
